claims.claim: Max Holloway is 34 years old and may be entering a period of physical decline.
claims.quote: to me that is a big like that that seems like a concern. And it just it felt like and and I still kind wonder and I've never heard him expressly talk about this, but like in that Olivivera fight um you wondered if he trained kind of, you know, like takedown defense if he if he was focused so heavily

claims.claim: Max Holloway lacked a viable Plan B or tactical adjustment capability in his fight against Charles Oliveira.
claims.quote: it certainly just looked like when you mentioned outclass that he was outclassed in that fight and that he just didn't have a very good plan B to go to. he didn't really have a a way to kind of move off of that and that was a red flag to me.

claims.claim: Max Holloway is undersized for the welterweight division, as he only walks around at 170-175 pounds.
claims.quote: I think he only walks around 170 175 like he is not a a huge um lightweight

claims.claim: Conor McGregor will have a significant size advantage over Max Holloway at welterweight.
claims.quote: All of that will play in in terms of fighting a very big Conor McGregor who's going to have to cut weight to to the 170.

claims.claim: Max Holloway is 34 years old, which raises concerns about whether he is beginning to decline.
claims.quote: the big question is at 34 years old, is this going to be the moment where we start to see that decline?

claims.claim: Max Holloway lacks a natural size advantage at 170 pounds, as he typically walks around at 170-175 pounds.
claims.quote: I think he only walks around 170 175 like he is not a a huge um lightweight

claims.claim: Max Holloway has accumulated significant physical damage throughout his career due to participating in many wars.
claims.quote: he's taken a lot of damage. He's certainly getting a lot older.

claims.claim: Max Holloway has been highly active, fighting eight times during the period Conor McGregor has been inactive.
claims.quote: Max in that time has fought eight times. um you know in the time that we've last seen Conor McGregor

claims.claim: Max Holloway's tendency to engage in unnecessary wars has caused him to take more damage than required.
claims.quote: he's probably taken more damage than necessary through his career.

claims.claim: Max Holloway is technically superior now compared to his first fight against Conor McGregor.
claims.quote: that is a moment in time for both guys, but especially for Max that no longer exists. He is vastly better than that.

claims.claim: Max Holloway would handle Conor McGregor's kicking arsenal better now than he did in their first encounter.
claims.quote: Connor was throwing a lot of kick kicks like a whole arsenal of kicks and I feel like that's something that Max would better handle now

claims.claim: Conor McGregor's power will likely carry over to the 170-pound division.
claims.quote: He probably his power is going to carry a 170.

claims.claim: Max Holloway has technically matured and is vastly better than he was during his first fight with Conor McGregor.
claims.quote: you could just see how much he had technically matured in that time... He is vastly better than that.

claims.claim: Max Holloway is physically undersized for the welterweight division.
claims.quote: I don't know if he's the best 55er and I definitely don't think he's the best 170er

claims.claim: Max Holloway will not be able to compete with top-15 welterweights.
claims.quote: he's not going to be able to compete with the 170ers who are you know at the top like even in the top 15 of that division

claims.claim: Conor McGregor's public standing in Ireland has significantly deteriorated due to recent controversies.
claims.quote: it's bad over there. It is bad for Conor McGregor.

claims.claim: Max Holloway possesses a consistent, high-volume pressure style that allows him to chip away at opponents over time.
claims.quote: Max has been Max is Max is a jackhammer in slow motion. Like he's just constantly chipping.

claims.claim: Max Holloway's star power would rise significantly if he defeats Conor McGregor.
claims.quote: if Max goes in there and does this like his star will rise again.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor is currently facing significant negative public sentiment in Ireland.
claims.quote: it's bad over there. It is bad for Conor McGregor.

claims.claim: Mauricio 'Hoofy' Ruffy has improved his game since training with Alexander Volkanovski and his team.
claims.quote: I feel like he has looked so much better since he got around Vulk... it feels like since he's been with the with those guys a little bit he's his game has certainly gotten better

claims.claim: Mauricio Ruffy has experience overcoming a size disadvantage in a fight where his opponent missed weight.
claims.quote: Huffy had a little experience, I guess, in having to face a guy who was bigger than him and he persevered in that fight just fine.

claims.claim: Mauricio Ruffy looked out of his depth in his loss against Benoit Saint-Denis.
claims.quote: Huie looked so bad against BSD. Like, so bad. So out of his depth.

claims.claim: Mauricio Ruffy's fighting style shares similarities with vintage Conor McGregor, specifically the karate-style stance.
claims.quote: they kind of do this blade, you know, karate stance. They like to get into this. The white stands kind of backward posture leaning and they they kind of go at it

claims.claim: Conor McGregor and Hoofy both utilize a blade-style karate stance with a backward-leaning posture.
claims.quote: you've watched them like they kind of do this blade, you know, karate stance. They like to get into this. The white stands kind of backward posture leaning

claims.claim: Conor McGregor and Hoofy both possess knockout power.
claims.quote: they both we know that they have, you know, knockout power.

claims.claim: Hoofy's new training environment has tightened his defensive lapses and improved his decision-making.
claims.quote: it seems like what the new training environment has done has allowed him to just still be who he is, but it has tightened up a lot of the defensive lapses or just the decision making about that.

claims.claim: Max Holloway's durability is potentially compromised following his knockout loss to Ilia Topuria.
claims.quote: Do you feel like Max's durability is compromised after, you know, getting KO'ed by Ilia?

claims.claim: Max Holloway's fighting style relies on maintaining a high pace behind his jab.
claims.quote: I feel like Max's ability to put a pace behind a jab

claims.claim: Hoofy is consistently prepared to accept short-notice fights.
claims.quote: he's always ready to do it.

claims.claim: Hoofy's fighting style is effective against any opponent.
claims.quote: His style works against anybody, you know, against truly anybody.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor's motivation to compete has diminished due to his wealth and business success.
claims.quote: I think that that's something that eventually goes away when you really get super rich or a businessman. You've been through all this stuff like you know I just don't think he can dig like that anymore.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor will likely be finished in the second or third round due to his inability to dig deep.
claims.quote: I could see a second or a third round where he's just taking damage and that's that.

claims.claim: No combat athlete has returned from a severe injury like McGregor's and performed at the same level.
claims.quote: I haven't seen a single combat athlete come back from that injury and look the same.

claims.claim: Chris Weidman looked reluctant to engage and was not the same fighter after his long layoff due to injury.
claims.quote: he was very very reluctant to engage. It looked like he was holstered. You know what I mean? Like I think it was Brad Tavvaris, right? Like he just didn't look like the same fighter.

claims.claim: Reinier de Ridder has more upside than Roman Dolidze despite both coming off two-fight losing streaks.
claims.quote: I feel like Derritter, while both are coming off of a two-ight losing streak, I feel like Derritter still has more upside.

claims.claim: Reinier de Ridder has a history of beating better competition than Roman Dolidze.
claims.quote: if you're RDR you've beaten better guys than Deise.

claims.claim: Roman Dolidze is likely to accommodate Reinier de Ridder's game plan by being willing to fight on the ground.
claims.quote: he might be very willing to accommodate you on the ground.

claims.claim: Beneil Dariush is currently past his prime as a fighter.
claims.quote: Benil, I think, is obviously a little past it.

claims.quote: he also looked real nervous

claims.claim: Saul Rogers got lucky in his victory over Beneil Dariush.
claims.quote: I think he also got a little bit lucky.

claims.claim: Beneil Dariush was able to take Mateusz Gamrot down for the first couple minutes of their fight.
claims.quote: Darius took him down for the first couple minutes, like primarily that's where the fight was happening.

claims.claim: Saul Rogers' takedown defense is good but not great.
claims.quote: It's good. I don't know if it's great. It's good.

claims.claim: Gamrot has a tendency to beat fighters he is expected to lose to and lose to fighters he is expected to beat.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor will have a size advantage over Max Holloway at 170 pounds.
claims.quote: he's going to be big on fight night. He's going to be bigger than Max.

claims.claim: Conor lacks resilience when a fight goes poorly.

So, I feel like it's got to be something up front early where he hurts Max probably just on the feet with a with a punch.
